revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月十七]][[zh:十二月十七]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 17|qq=December 17}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}. == Events == * {{ill|Eichō|en|Eichō|qid=Q1193646|lt=Eichō|1=Eichō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1097|en|1097|qid=Q19488|lt=1097|1=1097}} {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|qid=Q2156|lt=January 3|1=January 3}}) – Due to an extraordinary heavenly phenomenon and an {{ill|Earthquake|en|Earthquake|qid=Q7944|lt=Earthquake|1=Earthquake}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Kahō|en|Kahō|qid=Q1193280|lt=Kahō|1=Kahō}} to {{ill|Eichō|en|Eichō|qid=Q1193646|lt=Eichō|1=Eichō}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Chōkan|en|Chōkan|qid=Q1193904|lt=Chōkan|1=Chōkan}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1165|en|1165|qid=Q19676|lt=1165|1=1165}} {{ill|January 30|en|January 30|qid=Q2287|lt=January 30|1=January 30}}) – The Lotus King Temple ({{ill|Sanjūsangen-dō|en|Sanjūsangen-dō|qid=Q653319|lt=Sanjūsangen-dō|1=Sanjūsangen-dō}}) held a memorial service. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1633|en|1633|qid=Q6870|lt=1633|1=1633}} {{ill|January 26|en|January 26|qid=Q2282|lt=January 26|1=January 26}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} established the {{ill|Ōmetsuke|ja|大目付|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmetsuke|1=Ōmetsuke|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11438061}} to monitor the daimyō. * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|qid=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|January 14|en|January 14|qid=Q2257|lt=January 14|1=January 14}}) – Insurgents of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|qid=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain}}, led by a radical faction of the {{ill|Sonnō jōi|ja|尊皇攘夷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonnō jōi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尊王攘夷|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尊王攘夷}} movement known as the {{ill|Tengu-tō|ja|天狗党|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengu-tō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天狗党の乱|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天狗党の乱|1=Mito Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1040831}}, who had taken up arms on {{ill|Mount Tsukuba|en|Mount Tsukuba|qid=Q1754619|lt=Mount Tsukuba|1=Mount Tsukuba}}, were pursued by government forces and forced to surrender in {{ill|Tsuruga|ja|敦賀|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuruga|1=Tsuruga|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11499525}}; over 300 conspirators were executed. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|qid=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1702|en|1702|qid=Q6819|lt=1702|1=1702}} {{ill|January 14|en|January 14|qid=Q2257|lt=January 14|1=January 14}}) – {{ill|Emperor Nakamikado|en|Emperor Nakamikado|qid=Q314817|lt=Chūgimon Tennō|1=Emperor Nakamikado}}, the 114th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (died {{ill|1737|en|1737|qid=Q6993|lt=1737|1=1737}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Senka|en|Emperor Senka|qid=Q329728|lt=Senkatennō|1=Emperor Senka}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|536|en|536|qid=Q30322|lt=536|1=536}} {{ill|January 25|en|January 25|qid=Q2279|lt=January 25|1=January 25}}) – {{ill|Emperor Ankan|en|Emperor Ankan|qid=Q241765|lt=Ankan Tennō|1=Emperor Ankan}}, the 27th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|466|en|466|qid=Q30506|lt=466|1=466}}). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1710|en|1710|qid=Q6861|lt=1710|1=1710}} {{ill|January 16|en|January 16|qid=Q2261|lt=January 16|1=January 16}}) – {{ill|Emperor Higashiyama|en|Emperor Higashiyama|qid=Q313801|lt=Higashiyama Tennō|1=Emperor Higashiyama}}, the 113th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|1675|en|1675|qid=Q7624|lt=1675|1=1675}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|16|12|18|11|17|1|12|1217|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十二月十七]]

[[ko:음력 12월 17일]] [[ja:12月17日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十二月十七]]
